title: Deckers Disrupts Sneaker Segment as Uggs Owner Turns HOKA Into $1B Brand
text: There's a new name in the global sneaker wars: Deckers Brands, which has seen its HOKA brand grow into a $1 billion brand that's poised to take on Nike, Adidas and the other titans of the footwear industry.

title: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (DECK) CEO Dave Powers on Q1 2023 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (NYSE:DECK ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 28, 2022 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Erinn Kohler - Vice President, Investor Relations, Corporate Planning and Business Analytics Dave Powers - President and Chief Executive Officer Steven Fasching - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Jonathan Komp - Robert W. Baird & Co. Sam Poser - Williams Trading, LLC Laurent Vasilescu - Exane, Inc. Jim Duffy - Stifel Financial Corp. John Kernan - Cowen Inc. Paul Lejuez - Citigroup Inc. Jay Sole - UBS Group AG Operator Good afternoon, and thank you for standing by.

title: Deckers (DECK) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Deckers (DECK) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 24.81% and 6.81%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Ugg boot maker Deckers' fiscal Q1 earnings, sales top views, stock up 4%
text: Deckers Outdoor Corp. DECK, +2.14% stock jumped more than 4% in the extended session Thursday after the maker of Teva sandals and Ugg boots, among other brands, reported fiscal first-quarter earnings and sales above Wall Street expectations and tweaked higher its per-share earnings outlook for the year. Deckers said it earned $44.9 million, or $1.66 a share, in the quarter, compared with $48.1 million, or $1.71 a share, in the year-ago quarter.

title: DECKERS BRANDS REPORTS FIRST QUARTER FISCAL 2023 FINANCIAL RESULTS
text: HOKA Achieves One-Billion Dollar Revenue Milestone on Trailing Twelve Months FY 2023 Revenue Growth 10-11% and Operating Margin 17.5-18.0% Guide Reiterated FY 2023 EPS Guide Raised to $17.50-$18.35, Reflecting First Quarter Share Repurchase Board of Directors Approved Additional Share Repurchase Authorization of $1.2 Billion GOLETA, Calif. , July 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), a global leader in designing, marketing, and distributing innovative footwear, apparel, and accessories, today announced financial results for the first quarter ended June 30, 2022.

title: Deckers Brands Announces Conference Call to Review First Quarter Fiscal 2023 Earnings Results
text: GOLETA, Calif. , July 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), a global leader in designing, marketing and distributing innovative footwear, apparel and accessories, today announced that the Company's conference call to review first quarter fiscal 2023 results will be on Thursday, July 28 th, 2022 at approximately 4:30 pm Eastern Time.

title: Teva Collaborates with Coco and Breezy for a Capsule Collection of Summer Essentials
text: GOLETA, Calif. , July 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Teva®, a division of Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), is thrilled to announce the release of its collaboration with eyewear designers and DJ twins, Coco and Breezy, consisting of sandals and sunglasses made with earth-conscious materials and available in all-gender sizing.

title: Sanuk Partners with Donavon + Petra Frankenreiter for Premium Capsule Collection
text: Boho Chic-Inspired You & Me Collaboration Features Sustainable Materials and Stylish Details GOLETA, Calif. , July 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Sanuk, a division of Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), today announced an exclusive capsule collection with "sole-mates" Donavon Frankenreiter, legendary professional surfer and musician, and Petra Frankenreiter, fashion-forward entrepreneur and owner of Kauai's The Barn 808.

title: Deckers Brands Appoints Anne Spangenberg as President of Fashion Lifestyle
text: GOLETA, Calif., July 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), a global leader in designing, marketing and distributing innovative footwear, apparel and accessories, today announced the appointment of Anne Spangenberg as President of Fashion Lifestyle, effective July 11, 2022.
